name: Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs; mix well.
5. In a medium bowl, combine flour, oats, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt (if using). Mix well.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture; mix until just combined.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto the prepared cookie sheet.
8. In a small bowl, combine the remaining sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle lightly over each cookie.
9. Bake for 8-10 minutes.
10. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before transferring them to a wire cooling rack.
